story.text:
# 📖 Tome III Act 2: Selene's Witness
**act** · shared · narrative

Selene 🌙 admitted to the cosmological-witness tier. The Moon's four-billion-year orbit proves what the Earth has forgotten — the zero-knowledge proof at cosmological scale.
> *Trust can be preserved without memory of origin as long as a sufficient witness keeps the proof.*
